name: approaches
description: Solution-approach deliberation: before non-trivial implementation, generate 2-3 structurally different approaches, compare trade-offs, pick with a stated kill-trigger — plus a strategy catalog (tracer bullet, walking skeleton, spike, strangler fig, inversion, Polya) mapped to the risk each one beats, and an auto-nudged second-opinions round where a fixed persona trio (Standards Purist, Quality-over-Speed, Skeptic-Investigator) argues refactor-shaped tasks to one pick in a single round. Includes /approaches:compare and /approaches:opinions.
